description_long: This sculpture depicts two dogs, one large and one small, both sitting on a textured base that resembles a section of ground or a tree stump. The larger dog, possibly a retriever or similar breed, is positioned prominently at the center, with detailed fur texture and a friendly, open-mouthed expression. The smaller dog sits closely beside the larger one, also rendered with visible fur details and a calm demeanor. The entire sculpture is crafted to mimic the appearance of carved wood, with visible grain and rough, naturalistic surface features. The base is square and appears to be set on a cobblestone-like platform, suggesting an outdoor installation. The coloration is predominantly brown with lighter highlights, enhancing the wood-like effect.
description: A detailed sculpture of two dogs, one large and one small, sitting together on a textured base that resembles carved wood. The piece features realistic fur details and a naturalistic, friendly appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing both dogs facing forward, with the larger dog in the center and the smaller dog to its left, both sitting on a textured base.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the larger dog, with its tail curled around and the smaller dog partially visible behind.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of both dogs, the larger dog's tail and the full shape of the base are clearly visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the larger dog's profile and the smaller dog sitting close by, with detailed fur texture visible on both.
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is installed outdoors on a cobblestone or paved surface, suggesting a public urban or park setting.
